nodes.label: TSMC retains >90% of sub-5nm production with <=5% alternative capacity.
nodes.watch_signal: Samsung/Intel 3nm/4nm yield rates and external wafer capacity; TSMC's non-Taiwan capacity ramp.

nodes.label: Fab chemical buffers are 30-45 days, 90% fab chemicals via sea, Japan dominates photoresist.
nodes.watch_signal: Diversification of critical fab material sources and logistics pathways for Taiwan fabs.

nodes.label: Thesis's tiered digital economy dependency and paralysis rates accurately reflect real-world vulnerability.
nodes.watch_signal: Empirical data on sector-specific advanced chip dependency; observed adaptive capacities in simulated disruptions.

nodes.label: Fab build times remain ~4 years and ASML lead times ~1.5 years even under crisis conditions.
nodes.watch_signal: Acceleration of new fab construction projects; ASML's ability to prioritize or ramp production under geopolitical pressure.
